Data-Driven Policy Innovation

Elevate Your Policy Strategy with Data-Driven Insights

MGR Policy Group provides consulting services at the intersection of policy and technology to drive your business with data-driven insights and strategies.

View Services Contact Us
What We Do

Specialty Services

We provide a broad range of consulting services to bring digital transformation in policy strategies and drive efficiency.

State Policy Consulting

We provide data-driven insights and help develop insightful strategies.

  • Provide understanding of state and local policy nuances around the disease state for your product
  • Identify current and proposed access to care within state and local pharmaceutical programs
  • Monitor and counsel on existing or pending state laws or regulations that may impact access to care

Advocacy Development

We assist organizations to identify key stakeholders and develop strategic alliances.

  • Assist with recognition of key advocates within disease state or drug category
  • Ensure your organization has a stakeholder seat at the table on current and proposed policy
  • Identify key players in the advocacy space and assist with alliance development

Strategic Planning

We work with sales, marketing, and government affairs teams to develop data-driven strategies.

  • Work directly with sales, marketing, and Government Affairs teams to develop pull-through strategies
  • Provide insights on state systems (State Medicaid Formularies) and navigate the approval process
  • Develop initiatives for access to care in key markets
About Us

Experience & Vision

MGR Policy Group provides consulting services at the intersection of policy and technology to drive your business with data-driven insights and strategies. We bring pieces together and create an all-in-one system.

Our Approach

We combine deep domain expertise in government affairs and health policy with modern data analytics and technology platforms. Our goal is to empower organizations with actionable intelligence that drives informed decision-making and measurable results.

Meet the Founder

Martin N. Matthews

Founder & Principal

Martin brings over 30 years of extensive experience in government affairs, health education, sales training, public health research, and managed care. His unique approach synthesizes data from clinical studies, government mandates, insurance policies, and market dynamics to create comprehensive insights.

Prior to founding MGR Policy Group, Martin served as a director of Government Affairs and Policy at a global pharmaceutical company, where he built and managed a national team of policy professionals.

Martin earned his Bachelor of Science degree from Morehouse College and is recognized for his out-of-the-box approach to problem solving.
